title: Pench National Park
tagline: Pench National Park — wildlife reserve of Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: Pench National Park is a national park in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh.
overview.description: Pench National Park is a national park in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. It was created in 1983 with an area of 292.85 km2 (113.07 sq mi) in the Seoni and Chhindwara districts. Since 1992, the park has formed part of the core of the Pench Tiger Reserve, together with Pench Mowgli Sanctuary. The wider reserve also includes a substantial buffer area.

topPlaces.name: Totladoh Dam
topPlaces.description: Totladoh dam, is a gravity dam on the Pench river near Ramtek in Nagpur district in the state of Maharashtra and adjoining Madhya Pradesh in India.

topPlaces.name: Pench Tiger Reserve
topPlaces.description: Pench Tiger Reserve is a tiger reserve in India straddling across Madhya Pradesh and Maharashtra. On the Madhya Pradesh side, it encompasses a core area of 411.33 km2 (158.82 sq mi), with a buffer of 768.3 km2 (296.6 sq mi), making for a total protected area of 1,179.63 km2 (455.46 sq mi).

topPlaces.name: Totaladoh
topPlaces.description: Totaladoh is a census town in Nagpur district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pench National Park?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pench National Park is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Pench National Park?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar International Airport, Nagpur (70 km) and the nearest railway station is Nagpur Junction (62 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pench National Park?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pench National Park at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pench National Park?
faq.a: Stays in Pench National Park start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pench National Park?
faq.a: The top attractions are Totladoh Dam, Pench Tiger Reserve, Totaladoh.
